label: Town of Jova to Aljiba Woods
summary: Keeps Berkeley -> Denis Woods -> Dabi's Path physically continuous while Town of Veros eases between the Veros Woods side and the Dabi's Path side of the lower projection gap based on the current view.

availableLayouts.label: Branch continuous

notes: Pixels are rendered in the browser from ROM-derived CHR, layout, metatile, and palette bytes.
Actor sprites are rendered in the browser from ROM-derived CHR, decoded metasprite selector records, and ROM sprite palette fragments.
Breakable terrain overlays are scanned from ROM-expanded background tile signatures.
Presentation coordinates are authored for player readability and are not ROM world coordinates.
No PNG map textures are emitted for this app slice.

actorClasses.label: Jova shepherd
actorClasses.proof: ROM row id $B5 maps through live id $35 to animation record $0E, which emits selectors $24/$25.

actorClasses.label: Jova man
actorClasses.proof: ROM row id $AA maps through live id $2A to animation record $0D, which emits selectors $22/$23.

actorClasses.label: Town woman
actorClasses.proof: ROM row id $A9 maps through live id $29; the shared town routine at 1:$8F50 selects animation record $0A, which emits selectors $1C/$1D.

actorClasses.label: Jova clue NPC
actorClasses.proof: ROM row id $A8 maps through the town high-bit path to the same town-man animation record $0D.

actorClasses.label: White-crystal merchant
actorClasses.proof: ROM row id $AE maps through live id $2E to merchant animation record $0B, which emits selectors $1E/$1F.

actorClasses.label: Crow
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $01 dispatches to 1:$8FAA, which writes selector-stream record $08 before normal actor rendering.

actorClasses.label: Skeleton
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $03 uses selector-stream record $05, proven by live actor traces and decoded fixed-bank selector bytes.

actorClasses.label: Fishman
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $04 uses selector-stream record $06 for the body frames; the fishman proof supplies the segment sprite palettes.

actorClasses.label: Eyeball
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $08 dispatches to 1:$A7CA, which writes selector-stream record $39.

actorClasses.label: Bat

staticPreview.reason: The ROM zigzag bat moves while flapping. Static guide placement offsets the second selector frame so the body does not appear to snap upward inside a fixed map marker.

actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $09 dispatches to 1:$A7F2, which writes selector-stream record $3A after its movement setup.

actorClasses.label: Spider
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $0E dispatches to 1:$8425, which writes selector-stream record $23.

actorClasses.label: Werewolf
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $13 uses selector-stream record $1E, proven by live Jova Woods actor traces.

actorClasses.label: Zombie
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $17 is loaded by the town night actor gate and uses selector-stream record $37.

actorClasses.label: Sacred Flame
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $26 dispatches through 1:$8335; that routine passes selector-record index $20 to fixed-bank $DED8, which emits metasprites $78/$79 for the sacred-flame reward fixture.

actorClasses.label: Hidden clue book
actorClasses.proof: ROM actor id $27 dispatches through 1:$8335; that routine passes selector-record index $3B to fixed-bank $DED8, which emits metasprite $30 for the book fixture.

secret.action: Throw Holy Water at the marked stacked blocks, or equip Dracula's Nail and whip them, to reveal the Sacred Flame.
secret.reveal: The Sacred Flame appears after the stacked blocks are opened.
evidence: Actor id 0x26 uses item/fixture dispatch 1:$8335 and selector-record index $20.
Holy Water is weapon index 4: fixed-bank 7:$F237-$F2D2 selects $4A bit $08, and 7:$D8C0 spawns projectile actor $33 for that selected weapon.
Dracula's Nail is inventory index 4: fixed-bank 7:$F275 maps $91 bit $08 to selected item $04, and 7:$D623 gates the block-hit routine on $4F == 04 before calling 7:$D3AC.
Text pointer index 0x76 decodes to the Sacred Flame pickup message.

secret.action: Throw Holy Water at the marked block, or equip Dracula's Eyeball, to reveal the hidden clue book.
secret.reveal: The clue book appears at the marked spot.
evidence: Actor id 0x27 uses item/fixture dispatch 1:$8335 and selector-record index $3B.
Holy Water is weapon index 4: fixed-bank 7:$F237-$F2D2 selects $4A bit $08, and 7:$D8C0 spawns projectile actor $33 for that selected weapon.
Dracula's Eyeball is inventory index 3: fixed-bank 7:$F275 maps $91 bit $04 to selected item $03, and actor routine 1:$8335 clears the hidden flag when $4F == 03.
Text pointer index 0x0D decodes to the blue-crystal lake clue.
